name: synthetic-forward-chain
description: Fictional support thread forwarded into the user's inbox. Outermost sender (Robin) forwards a 4-deep chain. Tests forward parsing, signature stripping (Mona's contact block, 'Best,/Robin'), address consolidation (Sam appears twice — once with email, once name-only), and the system event ('Robin forwarded this thread to you').
captureSource: Synthetic — no real PII. Safe to commit.

body.content:
FYI — looping you in. We need a fix by Friday.

Best,
Robin

From: Sam Patel <sam.patel@example.com>
Sent: Tuesday, April 14, 2026 5:42 PM
To: Robin Lee
Subject: Re: Login outage on widget-prod

Confirmed — engineering is on it. Mona has the trace.

From: Mona Schwartz
Sent: Tuesday, April 14, 2026 4:18 PM
To: Sam Patel
Subject: Re: Login outage on widget-prod

I pulled the SAML logs. The IdP cert rotated overnight and our cached JWKS didn't refresh. Restarting the auth pods cleared it for now but we need a real fix.

Mona Schwartz
Senior SRE, Platform
Acme Widgets · mona.schwartz@example.com · +1 555 0144

From: Sam Patel
Sent: Tuesday, April 14, 2026 3:55 PM
To: support@example.com
Subject: Login outage on widget-prod

Customers can't log into widget-prod since 14:30 UTC. ~40 tickets and rising. Anyone seeing this on the platform side?

Get Outlook for iOS
